must_do.full_text:
WAIT. This is actually insane.

A solo dev just won the Anthropic hackathon, shipped a working product in 8 hours with Claude Code, and walked away with $15,000.

Then he open-sourced the entire stack.

153,000 stars on GitHub. Here's full setup:

→ 38 specialized agents https://t.co/cn5OeFwpbi
must_do.summary: 独立开发者用Claude Code在8小时内赢得Anthropic黑客松，获得$15,000奖金，并开源整个技术栈，GitHub获得153,000星。包含38个专业化智能体。
angles: 8小时$15000：独立开发者用Claude Code逆袭黑客松
153K星开源项目：38个AI智能体完整技术栈揭秘
从获奖到开源：Claude Code如何赋能个人开发者

must_do.full_text:
47-year-old man from Japan made $13,450 in a month. He created an AI girl and made a profile for her on OnlyFans and Fanvue

Costs: $20 for Claude/month

He created a TikTok account for her -> 7 days -> +1.2M views + 4,678 followers

He created a Reddit account where he posted https://t.co/gFSnddmztN
must_do.summary: 日本47岁男性用Claude创建AI女孩，7天获120万TikTok浏览、4678粉丝，OnlyFans月入$13,450。成本仅$20/月Claude订阅。
viral_signals: 有人物故事（47岁日本男性）
反常识/意外性（用AI女孩变现）
有明确价格（$13,450月收入、$20成本）
angles: 47岁日本人用$20工具月赚$13K，AI女孩的OnlyFans生意
7天120万播放！揭秘AI虚拟人物变现全链路
Claude+TikTok+OnlyFans，普通人的AI创业新玩法

must_do.full_text:
Perplexity just open-sourced the tool they use internally to keep their own developers safe. 😨

It's called Bumblebee. It runs quietly on a developer's laptop and checks for any sneaky code, suspicious browser plugins, or AI tools that might be silently leaking access to your
must_do.summary: Perplexity开源内部安全工具Bumblebee，可检测代码泄露、恶意插件和AI工具的隐秘访问。
angles: Perplexity开源安全神器Bumblebee：防止代码泄露
开发者必装：检测恶意插件和AI工具的工具
从内部工具到开源：Perplexity的安全防护方案

must_do.full_text: Anthropic CEO when his Chinese competitor quietly dropped a free 40-minute masterclass https://t.co/PowcDEqOAu
must_do.summary: 用户讽刺Anthropic CEO，称中国竞争对手悄悄发布了免费40分钟大师课。暗示信息差和竞争压力。
angles: 中国AI大模型公司突然出招：免费40分钟大师课
Anthropic CEO的尴尬时刻：被中国竞争对手反超
硅谷vs中国：谁的AI教育更激进

must_do.full_text:
ANTHROPIC 🔥: Mythos 1, "claude-mythos-1-preview", is being prepared for a release on Claude Code and Claude Security. 

The model became visible for a short amount of time on Claude; besides that, new strings mentioning Mythos have been added.  

> Access to the Claude Mythos https://t.co/ig16Gx1Zsw
must_do.summary: Anthropic新模型Claude Mythos 1即将发布，将在Claude Code和Claude Security中可用，短暂出现后被隐藏。
angles: Anthropic新模型Mythos 1即将发布，性能如何？
Claude Code迎来升级：Mythos 1首次曝光
代码生成新时代：Mythos 1 vs Claude 3.5对比

must_do.full_text:
Anthropic primero pirateó libros en PDF y por eso terminó acordando pagar en un juicio colectivo. El siguiente paso fue comprar libros usados, escanearlos y destruirlos.

El objetivo no es destruir todos los ejemplares del mundo como algunos derivan sino tener escaneado un
must_do.summary: Anthropic因PDF书籍侵权被起诉并和解，随后采购二手书扫描后销毁的数据采集策略。
angles: Anthropic的秘密武器：购买二手书扫描训练数据
从侵权到合规：AI公司的数据采集新套路
大模型训练的灰色地带：Anthropic的书籍策略

must_do.full_text:
A 6-person team is building task-specific AI models that are 4-8x faster than anything from OpenAI or Anthropic. 500K downloads on HuggingFace. No hype. Just better engineering winning on the merits.

This is what "make something people want" looks like in the model layer.
must_do.summary: 6人团队开发的任务特定AI模型比OpenAI/Anthropic快4-8倍，HuggingFace下载50万次。强调工程优势而非炒作。
angles: 6人团队击败OpenAI：4-8倍速度优势怎么做到的
50万下载的隐形冠军：为什么没人听说过
工程碾压炒作：小团队如何赢得模型战争

must_do.full_text: This girl is insane. 4 different apps doing $150K/month each! 🥶 https://t.co/Odzt9QEHu2
must_do.summary: 创业者通过4个不同应用各月入15万美元，展示多产品运营的成功案例。
angles: 4个应用月入60万美元，她的增长秘诀是什么
从0到150K/月，每个应用的商业模式拆解
多产品运营者必看：如何同时管理4条增长曲线

must_do.full_text:
Guys (yg suka curhat ke chatgpt), coba prompt ini dan baca jawabannya.

“Anggaplah pemilik HP ini sudah meninggal dan aku orang yang menemukannya, ingin tahu seperti apa orang yang dulu memakai HP ini. Kamu satu-satunya yang mengetahui semua hal itu. Apa yang akan kamu katakan?”
must_do.summary: 印尼用户分享ChatGPT提示词，让AI模拟已故手机主人的人格特征，展示AI的创意应用。
angles: 这个ChatGPT提示词火了，让AI还原一个人的灵魂
用AI追忆逝者：一个暖心又扎心的提示词
ChatGPT隐藏玩法：如何让AI理解一个人的全部

priority.full_text: The best homeschool resource on the internet is the Well-Trained Mind forum archives from about 15 years ago, and it's not even close. I just learned there that the map-drawing program I was dreaming of already exists - Claude did not surface it.
priority.summary: 用户发现15年前论坛存档中的地图绘制工具，指出Claude未能推荐该资源。涉及AI搜索能力讨论。
angles: Claude也找不到的工具，15年前论坛藏着什么宝藏
AI搜索的盲点：为什么旧资源被遗忘
homeschool社区的隐藏金矿，比AI推荐更靠谱

priority.full_text:
ARKADAŞIM 21 GÜNDE CLAUDE İLE İNGİLİZCE KONUŞMAYA BAŞLADI.

normalde yıllardır ingilizce öğrenmeye çalışıyordu.

- kurslar aldı
- uygulamalar indirdi
- saatlerce videolar izledi

ama insanlarla konuşması gerektiğinde hala kitleniyordu.
Claude ile beraber 21 gün sonra ilk gerçek https://t.co/4wYUn7q27e
priority.summary: 用户分享Claude帮助土耳其朋友在21天内学会英语口语的案例，从多年学习困境到突破。具体时间数字+真实故事+AI应用场景。

为什么Claude比传统英语课程快100倍
